predicted_caption: Wë́mpa tso' kãñĩ́k a̱. Wë́mpa dur. Wë́mpa tö kàl kṍpa tsók. Ie'pa kalö̀io apàio tã'. Kàl kṍpa kṍpa.
back_translation: The men are in the forest. The men stand. The men hold spears. They wear pants. The spears are long.
target_caption: Ie'pa bák se' shkë́ki ie, Wö́su̱k ie'pa e̱' chö tö irir ká̱ bulu' e̱na̱ ie'pa wö̀ki kò̱s íyi tso' e' wë́rke . Ká̱ i̱â̱i̱â̱ ie'pa bák sè̱nu̱k ká̱ i' ki̱.

predicted_caption: Yë́jkuö tso' akõ' ki̱. Akõ' kàl wa. Íyiwak tso' yë́jkuö a̱. Tkabë̀ tso' yë́jkuö a̱. Ók tso' yë́jkuö a̱. Dù tso' yë́jkuö a̱.
back_translation: A drawing is on the wall. The wall is wooden. Animals are in the drawing. A snake is in the drawing. A spider is in the drawing. A bird is in the drawing.
target_caption: Datsi’ tak wö̀a sarûrû, i kí̱ka íyi diö́köl wanyö’tso wè̱s: tkabë̀, sàl, ók, na̱mù̱ e̱na̱ tsawì.

predicted_caption: Ák íyi dalì tso' akõ' ki̱. Ák íyi kàl wa. Ák íyi wa̱ wö̀ dalì tso'. Akõ' sarûrû. Ák íyi dör wö̀. Ák íyi sulë.
back_translation: Many sculptures are on the wall. The sculptures are wooden. The sculptures have many colors. The wall is pink. The sculptures are faces. The sculptures are beautiful.
target_caption: Satë i ku̱a̱ki yö'tso ulù klö wa.I ki̱ idiö́köl târule è̱ë E̱na̱ mè̱ wa.

predicted_caption: Pë'pa dalì tso' ñõlõ̀ ki̱. Pë'pa tso' shkö̀k. Pë'pa tö yë́jkuö tso' tsók. Ù tso' ñõlõ̀ a̱. Apàio butûtû.
back_translation: Many people are on the road. The people are walking. The people are carrying signs. The buildings are at the road. The clothes are white.
target_caption: Ta̱î̱ pë’ dapàna̱ ká̱ kibí a̱ íyi ujtéchök. Ie’pa a̱ñì̱ wö̀ie i ká̱ ujtéchök.

predicted_caption: Wë́m dur. Wë́m tso' ù a̱. Ù tso' kapéblo a̱. Ù wö́kir tã́ĩ. Ák tso' ĩ́s ki̱.
back_translation: The man stands. The man is at the house. The houses are in the village. The roof is big. Stones are on the ground.
target_caption: Ù wë́rke bë̂rie élwe. Êköl wë́m yë̂âr ù wö́su̱k. Ie’ kalö̀io dalôlô, pàio sarûrû.

predicted_caption: Ù tso' kãñĩ́k a̱. Ù tã́ĩ. Ù kàl wa. Ù wö́kir shkì mã̀t. Kàl tso' ù wa.
back_translation: The house is in the forest. The house is big. The house is wooden. The roof is brown. The trees are with the house.
target_caption: Ù sulë pámi̱k ta̱î̱ ká̱ wë́rke tsipátsipa, wö́su̱k ká̱ í̱te̱ idir.
